title: Black Friday: Shopping Mania
description: Go shopping with this gorgie and get ready to take advantage of all the discounts! In the Black Friday: Shopping Mania game for girls, you and Kendall Jenner are hitting the mall with one purpose in mind: to shop till you drop! Hope youre wearing your comfy shoes... Its shopping time!
instructions: Use your mouse to play this game on a desktop or tap to play on mobile devices
